title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI-powered mouse pointer that understands what users are pointing at and provides contextual information. The system reimagines the traditional computer pointer interface using AI capabilities to enhance user workflows across websites and documents.
